info.title: KVAutoERP API
info.description: KVAutoERP – a modular, multi-tenant ERP REST API built on Laravel 12 with Passport OAuth2 authentication.

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns a Passport access token.
Authenticates a user with email and password and returns a Passport access token.
Revokes the authenticated user's current access token.

get.description: Returns the full profile of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Revokes the current token and issues a new access token (token rotation).
Sends a password-reset link to the provided email address if it exists.
Resets the user's password using the signed token received via email.
Exchanges a third-party SSO token for a local Passport access token.

get.description: Retrieve the full hierarchical tree of organization units.

patch.description: Move an organization unit to a new parent.

get.description: Retrieve tenant configuration by domain name. This endpoint is public.

message.description:
Global OpenAPI 3.0 specification entry-point.

This class carries the top-level Info, Server, SecurityScheme, Tag, and
reusable Schema attributes that apply to the entire KVAutoERP API.
The l5-swagger scanner picks them up automatically.

bearerAuth.description: Enter the Passport access token returned by POST /api/auth/login or POST /api/auth/register.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication – register, login, logout, token refresh, SSO, and password reset

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User management – CRUD, role assignment, preference updates

tags.description: Role management – create, list, view, delete, sync permissions

tags.name: Permissions
tags.description: Permission management – create, list, view, delete

tags.name: User Attachments
tags.description: User file attachments – upload, list, delete, serve

tags.name: Tenants
tags.description: Tenant management – CRUD, config update, domain lookup

tags.name: Tenant Attachments
tags.description: Tenant file attachments – upload, list, delete, serve

tags.name: Organization Units
tags.description: Hierarchical organizational unit management – CRUD, tree view, move

tags.name: OrgUnit Attachments
tags.description: Organization-unit file attachments – upload, list, delete, serve
